recommendations.title: Stuart Little
recommendations.overview: When the Littles adopt Stuart, the mouse, George is initially unwelcoming to his new brother, and the family cat, Snowbell, is even less enthusiastic. Stuart resolves to face these difficulties with as much pluck and courage as he can muster.

recommendations.title: The Lion King
recommendations.overview: Young lion prince Simba, eager to one day become king of the Pride Lands, grows up under the watchful eye of his father Mufasa; all the while his villainous uncle Scar conspires to take the throne for himself. Amid betrayal and tragedy, Simba must co

recommendations.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Comedy, Adventure, Family
recommendations.overview: A young boy and his dog, who happens to have a genius-level IQ, spring into action when their time-machine is stolen and moments in history begin to be changed.

recommendations.title: Flypaper
recommendations.overview: A man caught in the middle of two simultaneous robberies at a bank desperately tries to protect the teller with whom he's secretly in love.

recommendations.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
recommendations.overview: A hard-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats in need of a hero to defend them from a ruthless villain's wicked plot to wipe their village off the map. With help from a reluctant mentor, our underdog must assume the role of town samur
recommendations.director: Chris Bailey, Mark Koetsier, Rob Minkoff

recommendations.title: The Forbidden Kingdom

recommendations.title: Stuart Little 3: Call of the Wild

recommendations.title: The Haunted Mansion
recommendations.overview: Workaholic Jim Evers and his wife/business partner Sara get a call one night from  a mansion owner, Edward Gracey, who wants to sell his house. Once the Evers family arrive at the mansion, a torrential thunderstorm of mysterious origin strands them w

recommendations.title: Paddington 2
recommendations.overview: Paddington, now happily settled with the Browns, picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy, but it is stolen.

recommendations.title: The Good Dinosaur
recommendations.overview: An epic journey into the world of dinosaurs where an Apatosaurus named Arlo makes an unlikely human friend.
